data.title: Origami
data.synopsis:
Origami is a Japanese traditional art form of paper folding. This film explores the infinite possibilities of origami to bring life and wonder to the simplest material. Every aspect of the film is based on the skills and techniques used in actual origami art.

(Source: Official video)
data.background: Origami is the winner of the Silver Student Academy Award for Animation at the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences' 51st Student Academy Awards. It is the first Japanese work to win an award in the competition.

titles.title: Tsuma Netori Rei: Boku no Ayamachi Kanojo no Sentaku
妻ネトリ 零 ～僕の過ち 彼女の選択～

data.title: Tsuma Netori Rei: Boku no Ayamachi Kanojo no Sentaku
data.title_japanese: 妻ネトリ 零 ～僕の過ち 彼女の選択～
data.synopsis:
Takafumi is preparing breakfast. His wife Makoto, who was eating, checks the time and hurries off to work. She seems to be busy helping her senior teacher, Yasuno, recently.

That afternoon, Takafumi is called to the president's office. Takafumi's dream was to open his own store, but a few days ago, he found a store through Yasuno's intermediation, and the school's president, Shiraishi, even said he would invest in it. In the Chairwoman's office, he is told to go to the store this weekend and prepare for the opening.

Then, on the morning of the weekend. Takafumi says he will be away from home for a few days, and Makoto is worried about staying at the school late that day to help Yasuno-sensei. Still, Takafumi persuades her, saying, "I'm sure Yasuno-sensei will be fine."

That night, while Makoto was working in the staff room, she received a LINE message from Takafumi. "This should be finished soon. The other party is also feeling good. I'll tell you more when I get back tomorrow."

Makoto replies to the LINE message when Yasuno appears with a cup of coffee. Makoto drinks the coffee that Yasuno hands her, but collapses a little later. Yasuno looks at Makoto's body on the floor with a nasty smile...

(Source: ZIZ Entertainment)

data.title: Hanei
data.synopsis:
After her grandmother passed away, she tried to gain a deeper understanding of her life by interviewing relatives and friends. At the same time, she read many books about death, and her understanding of death gradually expanded, and her own thoughts changed. She expressed his deep feelings for her grandmother and offered a sincere eulogy.

(Source: U-NEXT, translated)
data.background: Graduate Work 2024 by Wenting Zhang, Musashino Art University.

titles.title: 未来からやってきた森

data.title: Mirai kara Yattekita Mori
data.title_japanese: 未来からやってきた森
data.synopsis:
This is the story of Wales-born C. W. Nicol who restored Japan's desolate forests. Nicol was involved with nature all over the world, including Arctic exploration and the creation of national parks in Ethiopia. He came to Japan, fascinated by the biodiversity of the country, with its drift ice to the north and coral reefs to the south. However, what he saw there were virgin forests being cut down one after another for economic reasons, and rivers being hardened with concrete. After learning that the Afan Argoed Forest Park in Wales had been restored by human hands, Nicol decided to create forests with his own hands to restore nature in Japan. He dreamed of the forests 100 years from now, which he would never be able to see.

(Source: Official site, translated)

(Source: Osaka City Lifelong Learning Information System, translated)

titles.title: Latna Saga: Survival of a Sword King
Survival Story of a Sword King in a Fantasy World

data.title: Isekai Kenou Seizon-ki
title_synonyms: Latna Saga: Survival of a Sword King
Survival Story of a Sword King in a Fantasy World
data.synopsis:
After being recently discharged from military service and just drifting through life, Hanbin Ryu is suddenly transported to another world. However, his "guide line," the system bestowed upon him to help with his survival and growth, was filled with errors, causing him to be stuck in the tutorial stage for over 20 years. When he is finally released from this personal hell, he finds everyone has turned against otherworlders like him. Just how will this low-level, super-tutorial newbie survive?

(Source: Tapas Media)
